sigWerErrors.reason: The insertion of 'bir' (meaning 'a' or 'one') does not significantly change the meaning of the sentence in this context; it is a minor stylistic difference.

Changing 'olmanıza' (your helping) to 'olmamıza' (our helping) shifts the subject from second person to first person plural, which changes who is being referred to as helping. This alters the meaning of the sentence significantly.
